title: prunus × lannesiana f. surugadai-odora
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. surugadai-odora is a fragrant flowering cherry plant, a type of ornamental plant known for its vibrant pink flowers and sweet fragrance. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to have medicinal properties in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential in reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Prunus × lannesiana f. surugadai-odora include tea infusions, essential oil extractions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
